name: Veryfi OCR API
description: Veryfi OCR API provides multi-modal data extraction from receipts, invoices, business cards, checks, contracts, tax forms, bank statements, and other documents. The API supports 91 currencies and 38 languages, offering intelligent document processing with line item extraction, classification, and fraud detection capabilities.
